tweets.content: RT by @elonmusk: Last year, @elonmusk brought national attention to the paper-based federal retirement process hidden deep underground in Boyers, Pennsylvania. The Last Day of Paper is more than a milestone, it is proof that government modernization can deliver real results for the American people. Thank you @POTUS and @elonmusk for the initial discussions that led to this important accomplishment: https://www.foxnews.com/politics/elon-musk-describes-limestone-mine-used-processing-federal-workers-retirement-papers-like-time-warp
tweets.translated: RT @elonmusk：去年，@elonmusk 引起了全国对隐藏在宾夕法尼亚州博耶斯地下深处的纸质联邦退休流程的关注。 《最后一天的纸张》不仅仅是一个里程碑，它证明政府现代化可以为美国人民带来真正的成果。感谢 @POTUS 和 @elonmusk 的初步讨论，促成了这一重要成就：https://www.foxnews.com/politics/elon-musk-describes-limestone-mine-used-processing-federal-workers-retirement-papers-like-time-warp

tweets.content: Free money, housing, etc acts as a massive financial forcing function to draw illegals to America and Europe
tweets.translated: 免费的金钱、住房等发挥着巨大的金融强迫作用，吸引非法移民前往美国和欧洲

tweets.content: RT by @elonmusk: Peter: "I heard you say you might want a mini woolly mammoth. Is that true?" Elon: "Yeah, I think it would be really cool to have a pet miniature woolly mammoth. That'd be pretty epic." Peter: "I'll put a word in with you for you with with with Ben [Lamm]." Elon: "That'd be adorable. Little things just running around trumpeting away and it's like look at the be a great little pet."
tweets.translated: RT @elonmusk：Peter：“我听说你说你可能想要一只迷你猛犸象。是真的吗？”埃隆：“是的，我认为拥有一只微型猛犸象宠物真的很酷。那真是太棒了。”彼得：“我会和本[拉姆]一起替你说句话。”埃隆：“那太可爱了。小东西到处跑来跑去，就像是一只很棒的小宠物。”

tweets.content: RT by @cz_binance: July. holidays? no, numbers. @BNBCHAIN doesn’t stop for the summer. - 65.2M $BNB burned so far, out of the original 200M supply. at today’s price (~$550), that’s roughly $35.9B… - 35 quarterly burns already completed. - 134.79M circulating today. - 34.79M left before hitting the 100M hard cap the 36th burn scheduled for this month. no pause, no slowdown, just steady deflation quarter after quarter. BuildNBurn.
tweets.translated: RT @cz_binance：七月。假期？不，数字。 @BNBCHAIN 不会在夏天停止。 - 到目前为止，已有 6520 万美元 BNB 被烧毁，超出了最初的 2 亿供应量。以今天的价格（~$550），大约是 $35.9B… - 35 个季度销毁已经完成。 - 今天流通量为 134.79M。 - 在本月计划的第 36 次销毁达到 100M 硬上限之前还剩 3479M。没有停顿，没有放缓，只是一个又一个季度稳定的通货紧缩。构建N燃烧。

tweets.content: RT by @cz_binance: CZ : Binance US was built in 2019 as a completely separate company. Own matching engine, own wallets, nothing shared with http://Binance.com Through CZ's entire Fight with the US government, Binance US was never part of it. No charges. Not in the plea agreement. It did face an SEC civil lawsuit and lost banking access for years because of it. Still stayed afloat. Still stayed profitable. Now banking is back. Zero-fee trading is live. Binance US is expanding again. Build separate. Stayed clean. That's the Binance US story 💛💛 Cc @ClipX0_ @cz_binance @BinanceUS
tweets.translated: RT @cz_binance：CZ：Binance US 成立于 2019 年，是一家完全独立的公司。自己的匹配引擎，自己的钱包，没有与 http://Binance.com 共享任何内容 在 CZ 与美国政府的整个斗争中，Binance US 从未参与其中。不收费。认罪协议中没有。它确实面临着美国证券交易委员会的民事诉讼，并因此失去了多年的银行业务准入资格。仍然漂浮着。仍然保持盈利。现在银行业又回来了。零费用交易已上线。币安美国再次扩张。分开建造。保持干净。这就是币安美国的故事💛💛 抄送@ClipX0_ @cz_binance @BinanceUS

tweets.content: RT by @cz_binance: Smart money used to mean knowing the right people, being in the right rooms. Now it means having the right agents. For years, building one took five tools, four logins, and a painful month of work. Today, it takes just a single prompt. BNB Agent Studio is live on BNB Smart Chain. Open @cursor_ai or Claude Code, describe the agent you want, and it ships to the chain with its own onchain identity, its own wallet, and a way to pay its own bills. The whole thing runs on @awscloud's Bedrock AgentCore, so your agent stays online long after you've closed your laptop. This is the start of the Smart Money Era. Capital that works for you instead of waiting for you to move it. Agents that monitor markets while you sleep, rebalance positions you'd never get to in time, and hunt yield without checking dashboards. Try BNB Agent Studio for free for a limited time with GitHub login only, with no AWS account or credit card needed. Read the full breakdown in our blog 👇 https://www.bnbchain.org/en/blog/bnb-agent-studio-is-live-on-bnb-chain-ai-agents-from-one-prompt
tweets.translated: RT by @cz_binance：聪明的钱曾经意味着认识正确的人，在正确的房间里。现在这意味着拥有合适的代理商。多年来，构建一个应用程序需要五个工具、四次登录和一个月的痛苦工作。如今，只需一个提示即可。 BNB Agent Studio已上线BNB智能链。打开 @cursor_ai 或 Claude Code，描述你想要的代理，它就会以自己的链上身份、自己的钱包和支付自己账单的方式运送到链上。整个过程在 @awscloud 的 Bedrock AgentCore 上运行，因此您的代理在您关闭笔记本电脑后仍能保持在线状态。这是智能货币时代的开始。资本为你服务，而不是等待你移动它。代理在您睡觉时监控市场，重新平衡您永远无法及时到达的头寸，并在不检查仪表板的情况下寻找收益。只需登录 GitHub，即可在有限时间内免费试用 BNB Agent Studio，无需 AWS 账户或信用卡。请阅读我们博客中的完整细分：https://www.bnbchain.org/en/blog/bnb-agent-studio-is-live-on-bnb-chain-ai-agents-from-one-prompt

tweets.content: Pinned: POLL: ICE has been abused by the Fake News Media at levels never seen before. They are Great Patriots who work hard, and do a fantastic job in a very hostile environment. Much of this hostility is caused by the Dumocrats and the Fake News. The concept I have had for quite some time — A strong feeling that the name of these Patriots, “ICE,” should be changed to, “NICE,” in that it will totally discombobulate Crooked, Dishonest, and Unpatriotic Reporters and Journalists. For them to say, “We went to a NICE Facility today,” as opposed to “ICE” or, “NICE Agents have deported a Violent Drug Dealer,” they won’t be able to handle it, they will go totally crazy! All it means is adding an “N” (“National”) to “ICE (“Immigration and Customs Enforcement”) — A much more prestigious name. Everyone loves it, but I have been told by the legendary Tom Homan that the Agents do not love it as much as the other population. Who thinks that we should add an “N” to change the name of “ICE” to “NICE?”   Thank you for your attention to this matter! President DJT
tweets.translated: 已固定：民意调查：假新闻媒体对 ICE 的滥用达到了前所未有的程度。他们是伟大的爱国者，他们努力工作，在非常恶劣的环境中做得非常出色。这种敌意很大程度上是由杜民主派和假新闻引起的。我有一段时间一直有这样的想法——一种强烈的感觉，这些爱国者的名字“ICE”应该改为“NICE”，因为这将彻底扰乱不诚实、不诚实、不爱国的记者和记者。对于他们来说，“我们今天去了一家 NICE 设施”，而不是“ICE”或“NICE 特工驱逐了一名暴力毒贩”，他们将无法处理，他们会完全疯掉！这意味着在“ICE”（“移民和海关执法局”）中添加一个“N”（“国家”）——一个更有声望的名字。每个人都喜欢它，但传奇人物汤姆·霍曼告诉我，特工们并不像其他人那样喜欢它。谁认为我们应该添加一个“N”来将“ICE”的名字改为“NICE”？   感谢您对此事的关注！总裁DJT

tweets.content: Just dropping these 3 slides from Agility Robotics ( $CCXI ) presentations. For the US robotic program doomposters: 1. “75% of parts” - sourced from the USA 2. Just eyeballing the graph, looks like <$30k BOM mass production. People were just looking at the ~$145K cost. 3. 10,000 RoboFab capacity, and they build in Salem/Pittsburgh/Fremont (USA). So looks like majority US supply chains with targets of <$30K mass production It does help they’re backed by $AMZN / SoftBank / Foxconn / $NVDA as investors to get this done. Just personal thoughts as a shareholder in $CCXI (NFA): My personal biggest fear were US humanoid leaders like $TSLA were just building out their entire supply chains in China. So US robotics could just be export controlled/halted down the road. eg. South China Morning Post: ‘Optimus chain’: Chinese suppliers form the backbone of Tesla’s humanoid robot initiative and engaged with hundreds of Chinese component suppliers. And that Western companies are not able to lower costs to a competitive level + are forced to use Chinese components. I'm still not sure how they're going to do it but if Agility can achieve those mass production targets with that BOM cost in the USA/West. It would be a great validation for Made in America US robotics programs. IMO the top 5 US humanoid programs right now in terms of commercialization potential are: 1. Tesla Optimus 2. Figure 3. Agility Robotics 4. Boston Dynamics (yeah KR parent) 5. Apptronik Tesla is a $1T+ company. Figure is private and valued around ~$39B. Owning Boston Dynamics through Hyundai is a bit messy. And I’d prefer not to invest in adversarial programs just as a personal preference. So I’ve been personally excited for Agility to be listed as early as September.
tweets.translated: 只是从 Agility Robotics ($CCXI) 演示文稿中删除这 3 张幻灯片。对于美国机器人计划的末日海报： 1.“75% 的零件”- 来自美国 2. 只要看一下图表，看起来 BOM 量产的成本低于 3 万美元。人们只关注约 145,000 美元的成本。 3. 10,000 RoboFab 产能，建于塞勒姆/匹兹堡/弗里蒙特（美国）。因此，看起来大多数美国供应链的大规模生产目标都在 3 万美元以下，这确实有助于他们得到 $AMZN / SoftBank / Foxconn / $NVDA 作为投资者的支持来完成这项工作。只是作为 $CCXI (NFA) 股东的个人想法：我个人最大的担心是像 ​​$TSLA 这样的美国人形领导者正在中国建立他们的整个供应链。因此，美国机器人技术可能会受到出口管制/停止。例如。 《南华早报》：“擎天链”：中国供应商构成了特斯拉人形机器人计划的支柱，并与数百家中国零部件供应商进行了合作。而且西方公司无法将成本降低到有竞争力的水平+被迫使用中国零部件。我仍然不确定他们将如何做到这一点，但 Agility 是否可以在美国/西方以 BOM 成本实现这些大规模生产目标。这将是对美国制造的美国机器人项目的一个很好的验证。 IMO 目前就商业化潜力而言，美国排名前 5 的人形项目是： 1. Tesla Optimus 2. 图 3. Agility Robotics 4. 波士顿动力公司（是的 KR 母公司） 5. Apptronik Tesla 是一家价值 1T 以上的公司。该图是私人的，价值约为 $39B。通过现代拥有波士顿动力有点混乱。我不想仅仅因为个人喜好而投资对抗性项目。因此，我个人对 Agility 最早在 9 月份上市感到兴奋。

tweets.content: There’s a lot of disinformation going around about $META “cutting capex” because they “overbuilt”. This is an “if” they have excess capacity. And it looks like the opposite right now: Hyperscalers like $GOOGL are so compute constrained that they had to cut allocations to Meta back in March. Since Meta was using too much for internal projects. Meta was immediately constrained so it looks like they were forced to immediately sign massive $48B+ contracts with Neoclouds like $CRWV and $NBIS. Meta is selling excess capacity if there’s any, especially since their large contracts are take or pay from the Neoclouds. If anything, I’m expecting their guided capex to go up as they build out more independent capacity.
tweets.translated: 有很多关于 $META 因为“过度建设”而“削减资本支出”的虚假信息。这是他们产能过剩的“假设”。现在看来恰恰相反：像 $GOOGL 这样的超大规模企业的计算能力非常有限，以至于他们不得不在 3 月份削减对 Meta 的分配。由于 Meta 在内部项目中使用了太多。 Meta 立即受到限制，因此看起来他们被迫立即与 $CRWV 和 $NBIS 等 Neoclouds 签署价值 48B+ 美元的巨额合同。 Meta 正在出售多余的容量（如果有的话），特别是因为他们的大型合同是从 Neoclouds 收取或支付的。如果有的话，我预计他们的引导资本支出会随着他们建立更多的独立能力而增加。

tweets.content: Basically pre-market right now with the Neoclouds like $NBIS in simpler terms. Costco: sells $5 chickens. Walmart: mass buys those rotisserie chickens and sells excess as “Walmart Chickens”. Stock Market: sells off Costco.
tweets.translated: 基本上现在就可以使用像 $NBIS 这样的 Neocloud，简单来说就是预上市。 Costco：卖5美元的鸡。沃尔玛：大量购买这些烤鸡，并将多余的作为“沃尔玛鸡”出售。股市：Costco 抛售。
